response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals, broad technical depth, and experience at scale (high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby, platform building), the resume lacks critical domain expertise for a Principal role in Growth/Experimentation Systems. Notably absent: any A/B testing, experimentation platform, feature flagging, or telemetry/metrics infrastructure experience—all core responsibilities. Additionally, the career trajectory shows individual contributor roles in varied domains rather than demonstrated Principal-level team leadership, cross-team influence, or mentorship at scale required for IC6 positions.
strengths: Broad technical depth across multiple languages, platforms, and scales (C++, Java, Node.js, TypeScript) with 20+ years of hands-on development

Proven ability to handle high-scale systems (millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby; millions of transactions at Optilyz) with strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Platform and open-source building experience (GISCollective) with demonstrated community leadership through workshops, talks, and mentoring (Refactoring Dojos, Code Kata sessions)
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, or feature-flagging platform experience—core competency for a Principal role in Growth/Experimentation Systems
No background in metrics infrastructure, telemetry, or data analysis required for designing instrumentation and measurement platforms
Career pattern suggests generalist individual contributor across diverse domains rather than Principal-level team leadership, mentorship, or cross-team influence at enterprise scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of A/B testing and experimentation platform expertise
No metrics/telemetry infrastructure or data analysis background
Proven high-scale system delivery and software engineering fundamentals
